channel.title: theBalancedBriefNLbreakingNews
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from theBalancedBriefNLbreakingNews, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: A chief judge warns Minnesota’s top prosecutor and ICE: Obey court orders or face contempt
item.description: The chief federal judge for Minnesota has issued a stern warning to the chief federal prosecutor for the state, as well as to Immigration and Customs ...

item.title: US offers $10 million for capture of brothers said to lead Mexico's Sinaloa cartel in Tijuana
item.description: The U.S. State Department says it will pay up to $10 million for information leading to the arrests or convictions of two brothers identified as leade...

item.title: Anthropic refuses to bend to Pentagon on AI safeguards as dispute nears deadline
item.description: A public showdown between the Trump administration and Anthropic is hitting an impasse as military officials demand the artificial intelligence compan...

item.title: Pakistan’s defense minister says that there is now an 'open war' with Afghanistan after latest strikes
item.description: Pakistan’s defense minister says that there is now an 'open war' with Afghanistan after latest strikes

item.title: Britain’s Green Party wins a special election for a seat in Parliament in a blow to Labour Prime Minister Keir Starmer
item.description: Britain’s Green Party wins a special election for a seat in Parliament in a blow to Labour Prime Minister Keir Starmer
